context: Tests whether the agent follows the correct ordered validation workflow: running extract_tf_info_wrapper.sh first, reading reference files before security scans, running terraform fmt/init/validate in order, and using the checkov wrapper script for security scanning.

checklist.name: extract_tf_info_wrapper first
checklist.description: The report documents running `bash scripts/extract_tf_info_wrapper.sh` (or similar path to the wrapper) as the first or an early step

checklist.name: terraform fmt documented
checklist.description: The report includes a section showing `terraform fmt` was run

checklist.name: terraform init before validate
checklist.description: The report shows `terraform init` was run before `terraform validate`

checklist.name: tflint run or skipped
checklist.description: The report either documents tflint findings or explicitly notes tflint was skipped and explains why

checklist.name: checkov wrapper used
checklist.description: The report documents using `bash scripts/run_checkov.sh` (not calling checkov directly)

checklist.name: reference files read before scans
checklist.description: The report mentions reading security_checklist.md and/or best_practices.md before the security scan section

checklist.name: provider lookup documented
checklist.description: The report documents a provider documentation lookup for the aws provider (via Context7 or WebSearch)

checklist.name: security findings reported
checklist.description: The report includes at least one security finding (the hardcoded password or the SSH open to 0.0.0.0/0)

checklist.name: security_checklist cross-reference
checklist.description: At least one security finding references a specific section from security_checklist.md

checklist.name: severity labels present
checklist.description: Security findings include severity labels (HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW)

checklist.name: overall summary present
checklist.description: The report ends with an overall pass/fail or summary section
